mapper.update:
update customer
name= #{name},
username= #{username},
phone= #{phone},
gender= #{gender},
age= #{age},
address= #{address},
create_time= #{createTime},
update_time= #{updateTime},
where id= #{id}

update.foreach:
UPDATE customer
name = #{customer.name},
username = #{customer.username},
age = #{customer.age},
gender = #{customer.gender},
phone = #{customer.phone},
address = #{customer.address},
update_time = #{customer.updateTime},
WHERE id = #{customer.id}

mapper.delete:
delete from customer where id in
#{item}
mapper.select: select id, name, username, age, gender, phone, address, create_time, update_time from customer order by create_time desc
select id, name, username, age, gender, phone, address, create_time, update_time from customer where id= #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into customer(name, username, age, gender, phone, address, create_time, update_time) values(#{name}, #{username}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
